title: Exceptions
doc_html:
§2610.  Exceptions

Nothing in this Part requires persons lawfully in possession of marijuana or a controlled dangerous substance to pay the tax required under this Part.  

Acts 1990, No. 90, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1991.
